name: Patient Similar to Case Description
history: Brother died by suicide when the patient was young. Ongoing family conflict about discussing the loss. Parents initially did not allow the patient to seek talk therapy after the death.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must keep the family together to avoid being abandoned.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't let go of the past or I will lose my identity.
coping_strategies: Avoids discussing the past and focuses on maintaining family connections.
situation: Noticing that the brother's birthday is approaching.
auto_thought: I can't handle this alone, and my family won't support me.
behavior: Attempts to maintain family connections despite ongoing conflict.
